text: Which statement about firefighting foam is TRUE?

options.text: B) To be most effective, foam should be directed at the base of the fire.
C) Foam is most effective on burning liquids which are flowing.
D) Foam can ONLY be used to extinguish class A fires.

explanation: Foam creates a seal over the surface of burning liquids, making it highly effective for running fuel fires. It separates the fuel from oxygen, preventing reignition and effectively suppressing vapors.
